items.summary: Audit and update the app's background and foreground color palette to ensure sufficient color contrast ratios (WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) across all pages and components. Replace or adjust any low-contrast earthy/sandy background colors (e.g., overly light sand tones, washed-out terracotta) with more accessible alternatives that retain the warm, adventurous visual identity. Update CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind tokens in frontend/tailwind.config.js accordingly, ensuring changes propagate consistently to all components including cards, headers, buttons, form inputs, and the footer.
